title: ‘Women and Children Are Under Siege’: Protesters calls #JusticeforCwecwe
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The ANC, Sanco...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The ANC, Sanco (South African National Civic Organisation), Phakamani Makhosikazi (NPO), CPF Thembalethu, and George Community Forum added their voice to the "Justice for Cwecwe" cause by picketing in front of the York Park building.


> The group of protesters plans to hand over a memorandum to a representative of the Department of Education, situated inside the building.


"Women and children are under siege. We must stand up and work together," says Nomawethu Jantjies-Gushman of the ANC. She talks about their intention to bring rapists to book.

Previous articles:

- Residents of Thembalethu join #justiceforCwecwe
- George joins #JusticeForCwecwe march

Related articles:

- Police clarify comments on DNA samples in Cwecwe rape matter
- Justice for Cwecwe: AfriForum slams ‘social media detectives’ as outrage swells

Anton Titus ( acting director of the Department of Education in the Eden and Karoo District), the memorandum from ANC's Nomawethu Jantjies-Gushman and Phumela Nosana (Regional Secretary).

Photos: Michelle Pienaar


> VIDEO: Nomawethu Jantjies- Gushman of the ANC talks about their intention to bring rapists to book (Video: Michelle Pienaar).


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
